title: pseudocalyx aurantiacus
intro: Pseudocalyx aurantiacus, a type of flowering plant native to West Africa, is also known as the yellow-flowered calyx. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pseudocalyx aurantiacus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Pseudocalyx aurantiacus can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
